reasoning: This animation sequence will show the robot gently picking up a pair of flat shoes. The robot's arms will move in a careful, deliberate manner, reflecting the delicate nature of the shoes. In the first frame, both arms will be at rest, with the palms facing inward. In the second frame, both arms will move forward and slightly downward, as if reaching for the shoes.
